sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 97:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 97:1
items.html: Revoking the boundary in the screen is called “breaching and breaking”. See “breaching” (item 17). (Part 3, Chapter 7, item 1)
